convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.title: Convert XML to PDF Using Default XSLT
convert-xml-to-pdf-default-xslt.description: Shows how to load an XML file with Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and generate a PDF using the built‑in default XSLT transformation.

load-xml-from-memorystream-to-pdf.title: Load XML from MemoryStream and Add to PDF
load-xml-from-memorystream-to-pdf.description: Shows how to read XML data from a MemoryStream, convert it to a string, and insert it as a TextFragment into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xml-xsl-to-pdf.title: Convert XML with XSLT to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-xsl-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with a custom XSLT stylesheet via XmlLoadOptions and converting the transformed content to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.title: Validate XML against XSD and Generate PDF
validate-xml-xsd-generate-pdf.description: The example validates an XML file using an XSD schema and, if valid, loads it into an Aspose.Pdf Document to create a PDF file.

resize-pdf-pages-using-xml.title: Resize PDF Pages Using XML-Defined Page Size
resize-pdf-pages-using-xml.description: Reads width and height values from an XML file and applies them to each page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML
set-pdf-page-orientation-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML layout file, creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and setting each page's orientation (landscape or portrait) based on XML attributes.

set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML
set-custom-page-margins-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading margin definitions from an XML file and applying them to specific page ranges in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-page-numbers-into-pdf.title: Insert Automatic Page Numbers into PDF
insert-page-numbers-into-pdf.description: Shows how to add sequential page numbers to an existing PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

generate-pdf-table-from-xml-data.title: Generate PDF Table from XML Data
generate-pdf-table-from-xml-data.description: Shows how to load tabular data from an XML file into a DataSet and render it as a table in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

preserve-cdata-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Preserve CDATA Sections from XML in PDF
preserve-cdata-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with CDATA sections, extracting the CDATA text nodes, and rendering them as formatted text in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-font-to-xml-pdf-elements.title: Apply Custom Font to XML‑Derived PDF Elements
apply-custom-font-to-xml-pdf-elements.description: The example loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, and applies a custom TrueType font to specific text fragments such as titles and subtitles within the generated PDF.

embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf-from-xml.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font into PDF from XML
embed-custom-ttf-font-into-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to load XML into a PDF, open a TrueType font, mark it for embedding, replace all text fragments with the custom font, and save the PDF with the font embedded.

xml-to-pdf-with-external-css.title: Convert XML to PDF with External CSS via XSL
xml-to-pdf-with-external-css.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSL stylesheet that references external CSS and converting it directly to a styled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-from-xml-using-xsl-styling.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSL Styling
generate-pdf-from-xml-using-xsl-styling.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSL stylesheet to apply custom colors and converting it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-xml-color-pdf-background.title: Apply XML Color as PDF Page Background
apply-xml-color-pdf-background.description: Loads a PDF, parses an XML color string, sets it as the background color for each page, and saves the modified document.

add-header-footer-using-xml-template.title: Add Header and Footer to PDF Using XML Template
add-header-footer-using-xml-template.description: Shows how to load an XML template, convert it to a PDF stamp, and apply that stamp as a header/footer on every page of an existing PDF document.

add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Page Borders to PDF Using Graph
add-custom-page-borders-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to draw a rectangular border on each page of an existing PDF by using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing.Graph and related drawing classes.

apply-background-images-from-xml.title: Apply Background Images to PDF Pages from XML
apply-background-images-from-xml.description: Shows how to read an XML file that maps page numbers to image files and set each PDF page's background image using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-dynamic-headers-xml-pdf.title: Insert Dynamic Headers into PDF Using XML Data
insert-dynamic-headers-xml-pdf.description: Demonstrates reading per-page header text from an XML file and adding it to each PDF page as a header using Aspose.Pdf event handling.

insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF from XML
insert-footnotes-into-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading footnote definitions from an XML file and inserting them as footnote references and content into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-conditional-page-breaks-by-xml-le.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks Based on XML Content Length
insert-conditional-page-breaks-by-xml-le.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, calculate cumulative text length per page, and insert blank pages when a specified length threshold is exceeded.

generate-pdf-toc-from-xml.title: Generate PDF Table of Contents from XML Headings
generate-pdf-toc-from-xml.description: Demonstrates how to read a heading hierarchy from an XML file and build a Table of Contents in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content features.

create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml.title: Create PDF Bookmarks from XML Hierarchy
create-pdf-bookmarks-from-xml.description: Shows how to parse an XML document that defines a nested structure and generate matching PDF bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf's bookmark editor.

create-pdf-outline-from-xml.title: Create PDF Outline from XML Sections
create-pdf-outline-from-xml.description: The example reads an XML file with section titles and page numbers, then adds matching outline (bookmark) entries to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-outline-from-xml__v2.title: Create PDF Outline from XML Hierarchy
create-pdf-outline-from-xml__v2.description: Shows how to parse an XML file that defines bookmark nesting and generate matching PDF outlines using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-page-transitions-to-pdf-from-xml.title: Add Page Transition Effects to PDF from XML
add-page-transitions-to-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF, setting per-page presentation duration, and applying a fade transition to all pages using PdfPageEditor.

set-pdf-page-durations-from-xml.title: Set PDF Page Transition Durations from XML
set-pdf-page-durations-from-xml.description: Loads timing values from an XML file and applies them to each PDF page's Duration property using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-from-xml-fullscreen.title: Generate PDF from XML with Full‑Screen Viewer Mode
generate-pdf-from-xml-fullscreen.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, configuring the viewer to open in full‑screen mode, and saving the result as a PDF.

set-pdf-viewer-preferences-xml-to-pdf.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences When Converting XML to PDF
set-pdf-viewer-preferences-xml-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates converting an XML file to PDF with Aspose.Pdf and configuring viewer preferences such as FitWindow (fit‑page mode).

generate-pdf-from-xml-version-1-7.title: Generate PDF from XML with PDF version 1.7
generate-pdf-from-xml-version-1-7.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, converting it to PDF version 1.7, and saving the resulting PDF.

set-pdf-permissions-disable-printing-cop.title: Set PDF Permissions to Disable Printing and Copying
set-pdf-permissions-disable-printing-cop.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with custom permissions that block printing and content extraction, and saving the protected PDF.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Password Protection
encrypt-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, applying user and owner passwords with specific permissions, and saving the encrypted document.

digitally-sign-pdf-from-xml.title: Digitally Sign PDF Generated from XML
digitally-sign-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and then apply a digital signature using a PKCS#12 certificate, optionally adding a visible signature appearance.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-with-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF from XML with Permissions and AES-256
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-with-permissions.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, applying AES-256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and setting print and content-extraction permissions before saving the protected PDF.

compress-pdf-streams-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Streams from XML using Aspose.Pdf
compress-pdf-streams-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from its XML representation, applying stream compression with OptimizationOptions, and saving the reduced‑size PDF.

compress-pdf-text-streams-flate-xml.title: Compress PDF Text Streams Using Flate via XML Conversion
compress-pdf-text-streams-flate-xml.description: Shows how to export a PDF to XML, reload it, and apply Flate compression to all objects (including text streams) using Aspose.Pdf optimization features.

compress-pdf-from-xml.title: Compress PDF Text Objects from XML Using Aspose.Pdf
compress-pdf-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a PDF with XmlLoadOptions, enabling object compression via OptimizationOptions, and saving the reduced-size PDF.

downsample-images-from-xml.title: Downsample Images in PDF from XML
downsample-images-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, configure image downsampling using optimization options, and save the optimized PDF.

export-pdf-pages-high-res-png-from-xml.title: Export PDF Pages as High-Resolution PNG Images from XML
export-pdf-pages-high-res-png-from-xml.description: Demonstrates converting an XML file to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then exporting each PDF page to a PNG image with a specified DPI resolution.

decode-base64-images-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Decode Base64 Images from XML and Embed into PDF
decode-base64-images-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, extracts Base64‑encoded image data, decodes it, and adds each image to a new page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

render-svg-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Render SVG Elements from XML into PDF
render-svg-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an XML file, extract embedded <svg> elements, convert each SVG to a temporary PDF using Aspose.Pdf's SvgLoadOptions, and merge the resulting pages into a single PDF document.

render-html-cdata-to-pdf.title: Render HTML CDATA Sections to PDF
render-html-cdata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, extracting CDATA sections that contain HTML fragments, and rendering each fragment into a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-barcode-from-xml-to-pdf.title: Generate Barcode in PDF from XML Layout
generate-barcode-from-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF defined by an XML file, fill a barcode form field with Code128 data using Aspose.Pdf, and save the resulting PDF.

embed-video-annotations-from-xml.title: Embed Video Annotations in PDF from XML
embed-video-annotations-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file that describes video files and embedding each video as a MovieAnnotation in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf. The example validates file existence and page numbers before adding the annotations.

embed-audio-clips-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed Audio Clips from XML into PDF as Sound Annotations
embed-audio-clips-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to read an XML file that defines audio clip positions and embed each audio file as a SoundAnnotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-3d-models-from-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed 3D Models from XML into PDF as Interactive Annotations
embed-3d-models-from-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to read an XML file that references U3D/PRC model files and embed each model as a PDF3DAnnotation on the specified PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-javascript-actions-in-pdf-from-xml.title: Embed JavaScript Actions in PDF from XML
embed-javascript-actions-in-pdf-from-xml.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then add document‑level and field‑level JavaScript actions for form validation.

create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.title: Create PDF Form Fields from XML and Set Default Values
create-pdf-form-fields-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading an XFA form definition from an XML file into a PDF, generating the form fields, and assigning default values to specific fields.

populate-pdf-form-from-xml.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML Records
populate-pdf-form-from-xml.description: Shows how to read multiple <Record> elements from an XML file, fill an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's AssignXfa for each record, and save individual filled PDFs.

extract-plain-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Plain Text from PDF for Indexing
extract-plain-text-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF generated from XML, extracting its plain text using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber, and saving the result to a file for indexing.

export-pdf-pages-as-bmp-images-from-xml.title: Export PDF Pages as BMP Images from XML
export-pdf-pages-as-bmp-images-from-xml.description: Loads an XML file, binds it to a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, and saves each PDF page as a separate BMP image file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-res-png-thumbn.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution PNG Thumbnails
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-res-png-thumbn.description: The example loads a PDF document, iterates through each page, and saves every page as a 300 DPI PNG image for thumbnail creation.

create-pdf-thumbnail-from-xml.title: Create PDF Thumbnail from XML-derived PDF
create-pdf-thumbnail-from-xml.description: Shows how to load an XML file as a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and generate a PNG thumbnail of the first page.

batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.title: Batch Convert XML Files to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
batch-convert-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of XML files, load each with Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions, and save them as separate PDF documents.

merge-pdfs-from-xml-files.title: Merge PDFs Created from XML Files
merge-pdfs-from-xml-files.description: Loads multiple XML files, converts each to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, merges them into a single document, and saves the combined PDF.

paginate-large-xml-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Paginate Large XML into Multiple PDFs
paginate-large-xml-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates loading a large XML file with Aspose.Pdf, splitting its pages into fixed-size chunks, and saving each chunk as a sequentially numbered PDF file.

repeat-table-header-rows.title: Repeat Table Header Rows on Each PDF Page
repeat-table-header-rows.description: Shows how to create a multi‑page table in a PDF and configure Aspose.Pdf to repeat the header row on every page.

validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.title: Validate PDF/A‑2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
validate-pdfa-2b-compliance-xml-to-pdf.description: Loads an XML file, converts it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and validates the generated PDF for PDF/A‑2b compliance, outputting a validation log.

export-pdf-structure-to-xml.title: Export PDF Structure to XML
export-pdf-structure-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save its internal structure as an XML file for analysis and validation.

convert-xml-to-html-preview.title: Convert XML to HTML preview using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-to-html-preview.description: Shows how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, convert it to PDF in memory, and save the result as HTML for web preview.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-logging.title: Convert XML Files to PDF with Aspose.Pdf and Log Processing Steps
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-logging.description: The example reads XML files from a folder, uses Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions to load each file into a Document, and saves it as a PDF while logging each step and handling errors.

convert-xml-to-pdf-with-error-handling.title: Convert XML to PDF with Malformed XML Handling
convert-xml-to-pdf-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into Aspose.Pdf, handling malformed XML via a warning callback, and saving the result as a PDF with proper exception handling.

generate-pdf-from-xslfo-with-error-handl.title: Generate PDF from XSL‑FO with Custom Parsing Error Handling
generate-pdf-from-xslfo-with-error-handl.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO file into Aspose.Pdf with a custom warning handler to gracefully manage XML parsing errors, then saving the result as a PDF.

thread-safe-xml-to-pdf-conversion.title: Thread‑Safe XML to PDF Conversion Using Parallel Processing
thread-safe-xml-to-pdf-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to safely convert multiple XML files to PDF in parallel using Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and Document classes.

register-pdf-generation-service-di.title: Register PDF Generation Service with Dependency Injection
register-pdf-generation-service-di.description: Demonstrates adding a PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton to the IServiceCollection so it can be reused across the application.

xml-to-pdf-conversion-tests.title: Unit Tests for XML‑to‑PDF Conversion with XSLT
xml-to-pdf-conversion-tests.description: Shows how to convert XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf with optional XSLT transformations and validates the results with NUnit unit tests.

batch-xml-to-pdf-performance-profiling.title: Batch XML to PDF Conversion Performance Profiling
batch-xml-to-pdf-performance-profiling.description: Processes all XML files in a directory, converts each to PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and measures load and save times to help identify performance bottlenecks.

generate-pdf-with-retry-logic.title: Generate PDF with Retry Logic for Transient I/O Errors
generate-pdf-with-retry-logic.description: Demonstrates loading, modifying, and saving a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while applying retry logic to handle transient I/O errors.

generate-pdf-from-xml-using-xslt-config.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSLT Config
generate-pdf-from-xml-using-xslt-config.description: This example reads XML, XSLT, and output paths from a JSON configuration file, applies the XSLT transformation while loading the XML with Aspose.Pdf, and saves the resulting PDF.

convert-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.title: Convert XML with Multiple Namespaces to PDF using XSLT
convert-xml-multiple-namespaces-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSLT that declares distinct namespace prefixes, and directly creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-from-xml-with-custom-page-s.title: Generate PDF from XML with Custom Page Size
generate-pdf-from-xml-with-custom-page-s.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, applying custom page‑size settings to the first page, and saving the result as a PDF.

generate-pdf-from-xml-xsl-fo.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSL‑FO Template
generate-pdf-from-xml-xsl-fo.description: Shows how to load an XML file with an XSL‑FO stylesheet using Aspose.Pdf and save the transformed content as a PDF document.

apply-conditional-page-margins.title: Apply Conditional Page Margins in PDF
apply-conditional-page-margins.description: Shows how to assign different margin sizes to PDF pages based on their page number using Aspose.PDF's MarginInfo and PageInfo objects.

encrypt-pdf-from-xml-aes256.title: Encrypt PDF from XML using AES‑256 with Aspose.Pdf
encrypt-pdf-from-xml-aes256.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file into a PDF document, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, then saving the protected PDF.
